name: Homemade Lemon Pasta (with Butter and Pecans)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, lemon peel, and salt.
2. Make an indentation in the center of the mixture.
3. Add the eggs, lemon juice, and olive oil to the bowl.
4. Mix until well combined.
5. Transfer the dough to the pasta machine and process it on the MIX setting.
6. Continue processing until the dough forms small balls the size of peas.
7. Change the machine to the EXTRUDE setting and cut the dough into desired lengths.
8. Drop the noodles into boiling water and cook for 1 to 2 minutes, or until al dente (tender but firm to the bite).
9. Drain the pasta in a colander.
10. Toss with butter and pecans.
11. Serve immediately.
